description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn, driveway, and surrounding landscaping. The main structure features a dark gable roof, brick exterior walls, and multiple large windows, providing ample natural light. A covered front porch with steps leads to the main entrance, while a detached garage with a matching roof sits adjacent to the driveway. The property includes a backyard with a swimming pool, bordered by fencing and mature trees for privacy. Flowering shrubs and trees are strategically placed around the house, enhancing curb appeal. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the main house, garage, and outdoor amenities.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, detached garage, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front and side of the bungalow with the main entrance, porch, driveway, and detached garage visible, along with landscaped yard and pool.
description_view_1: View from above the driveway, highlighting the front porch, main entrance, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear and side view showing the backyard, pool area, and the back of the bungalow with more trees and fencing.
description_view_3: View from the backyard, focusing on the pool, rear facade of the bungalow, and the separation between the house and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
